name: Manohar Parsa
title: CSV Engineer
professional_summary: 8+ years experienced CSV Engineer with a strong pharmaceutical and healthcare validation background.
Proficient in Computer System Validation (CSV), ensuring lab systems, equipment, and software compliance with FDA regulations, GxP, and 21 CFR Part 11.
Skilled in developing and executing IQ/OQ/PQ protocols, risk assessments, and validation summary reports, demonstrating a strong understanding of GAMP 4 & 5 frameworks.
Proven track record in leading quality reviews and remediation efforts, ensuring documentation accuracy and audit readiness for pharmaceutical projects.
Conducted Factory Acceptance Testing (FAT) and supported qualification of packaging lines for various dosage forms, maintaining regulatory compliance.
Performed Data Integrity assessments, ensuring Electronic Records and Electronic Signatures (ERES) compliance with FDA guidelines and ALCOA+ principles.
Collaborated effectively with cross-functional teams (QA, IT, Engineering) to align validation scope with regulatory and business requirements.
Authored and maintained comprehensive validation documentation, including SOPs, Functional Requirements, and security protocols for validated systems.
Provided validation support for biotech environments, ensuring equipment qualification and compliance with internal and external audit requirements.
Extensive experience in testing, reviewing, and ensuring system security, user access, and audit trails for lab equipment and software platforms.

Software & Tools: Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, Visio, Outlook)

responsibilities: Created and reviewed CSV deliverables: URS, Risk Assessments, IQ/OQ/PQ Qualification Protocols, ensuring 21 CFR Part 11, GxP, and FDA compliance.
Performed Data Integrity assessments for ERES, ensuring compliance with FDA guidelines and data integrity principles (ALCOA+).
Validated lab equipment and enterprise systems using GAMP 5, ensuring compliance with SOPs and regulatory standards.
Standardized validation templates and documentation processes, improving consistency and reducing review times.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to align validation scope with regulatory and business needs.
Developed comprehensive checklists for lab equipment and software systems to ensure compliance with 21 CFR Part 11.
Authored and maintained SOPs, Functional Requirements, Risk Assessments, and security documentation for validated systems.
Provided validation support for biotech environments, including protocol execution and technical documentation.
Assessed regulatory risk and data integrity posture of computerized systems for internal and external audits.
Led qualification of complex systems: bioreactors, chromatography skids, EnVision Plate Readers, and T5 Titrators.
Ensured system security, user access control, and comprehensive audit trails by reviewing application-level configurations.
Conducted Positive and Negative Testing for application functionality, accuracy, and reliability.
Created and executed IQ, OQ, and PQ protocols, ensuring compliance with FDA regulations.
Validated LIMS and TrackWise systems, ensuring full functionality and compliance.
Provided input on Validation Rationale and cGMP training requirements for the department.
Led quality reviews of CSV deliverables (validation strategy, protocols, traceability matrices) as part of a Consent Decree remediation project.
Tested end-to-end workflows to ensure business requirements, data integrity, and validity were met.
Developed IQ/OQ/PQ and MSA protocols, focusing on inspection, testing, and statistical methods for process stability.
Prepared compliance reports evaluating GMP, GCP, and GLP status within the organization.
Closed CAPAs related to CSV for Automation and R&D teams, ensuring compliance and process improvements.
Reviewed validation protocols to ensure adherence to company and regulatory standards.
Participated in SOX, internal, and external audits to ensure system compliance.
Validated computerized laboratory equipment following GAMP 4 & 5 guidelines for operational standards.
Performed Factory Acceptance Testing (FAT) to ensure equipment functionality before delivery.
Defined and executed FMEA in line with GAMP 5 for the serialization project.
Supported qualification of packaging lines for Liquid, Semisolid, and Solid dosage forms, maintaining regulatory compliance.
Led team meetings to efficiently plan and update validation activities.
Executed and documented Software IQ, OQ, and PQ to ensure user requirements and reproducible results were met.
Created comprehensive Validation Summary Reports to summarize qualification outcomes.
Supported qualification of new software suppliers through software supplier audits.
Led cross-functional teams to ensure timely execution of software validation processes, aligning with project milestones.
Conducted risk assessments, identifying challenges and implementing mitigation strategies for seamless project execution.
Collaborated with stakeholders to define software requirements and validation criteria, ensuring business and regulatory alignment.
Provided guidance and training to junior team members on validation best practices.

education.degree: Master of Science in Health Informatics

education.institution: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Andhra Pradesh, India
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Doctor of Pharmacy
